key_moments.description: Ofori makes a direct death threat against his wife.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: If I don't kill your sister, then me, I'm sick.

key_moments.description: Ofori clears a weapon jam to continue the execution, demonstrating premeditation.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: The gun jams... he calmly clears the jam, racks the slide... and fires again.

key_moments.description: Ofori confesses to the murder during interrogation.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: I'm asking you is you did yes yes okay i'm not gonna lie to you

key_moments.description: Ofori claims he is a 'good guy' while justifying the murder as a result of his wife's actions.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: You know, I'm a good guy, guys. I'm a good guy.
